overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit downtown district. The player crosses a busy intersection, walks along a sidewalk under an elevated highway with dense traffic, and enters a dark homeless encampment beneath an overpass with tents and barrel fires.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with crosswalk and digital billboards

events.description: crossing the multi-lane street at the crosswalk with pedestrian signal
moving from open intersection onto sidewalk beneath elevated highway

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the crosswalk and stepping onto the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: person in purple jacket crossing the street in the same direction

entered.detail: Large billboard displaying 'AMENDMENT OF THE DEAD' text
Billboard showing boxing match advertisement with fighter image
Tall palm tree on the sidewalk corner
Pedestrian crossing signal showing green walk symbol
Massive concrete elevated highway overpass structure

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a busy Night City intersection at night, with large digital billboards and palm trees visible. The player crosses the street at the crosswalk, passing a pedestrian in a purple jacket, then moves onto the sidewalk beneath the elevated highway structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk under elevated highway with heavy traffic

events.description: slight right turn to follow the curve of the sidewalk
multiple vehicles passing by on the right side of the barrier

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk under the elevated highway next to heavy traffic

entered.detail: Red neon sign reading 'KABUKI' on building facade
Yellow and black striped concrete barriers separating sidewalk from street
Yellow metal railing along the edge of the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking under the massive elevated highway structure, the sidewalk is sheltered from the night sky. The Kabuki neon sign glows red on the left while dense traffic flows past on the right, separated by yellow and black barriers. The environment feels urban and enclosed.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown sidewalk with dense neon signage and heavy traffic

events.description: white sports car with red racing stripes passes by on the street
slight left turn approaching the dark underpass entrance ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the busy street, passing other pedestrians and observing the neon signs

notable_agents.action: person walking ahead on the sidewalk toward the underpass

entered.detail: Large blue neon sign reading 'CIRRUS' on building
Billboard displaying food advertisement with bowl of noodles
Elevated walkway bridge crossing over the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The sidewalk continues through the dense downtown area with vibrant neon signs including a large blue 'CIRRUS' sign and food advertisements. Heavy traffic flows continuously on the right. A pedestrian walks ahead as the camera approaches a dark underpass entrance in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: homeless encampment under highway overpass with tents and fires

events.description: turning left into the dark underpass homeless camp area
shifting from bright neon city lights to warm orange firelight and deep shadows

agents.ego_description: entering the homeless encampment and walking between tents and makeshift shelters

notable_agents.action: person standing near a barrel fire warming their hands

entered.detail: Blue and white striped tent set up in the encampment
Metal barrel with burning fire providing warm orange light
Tarp and cardboard shelter against the concrete wall
Piles of trash bags and discarded items along the wall

segments.scene_description: Turning left into a dark, enclosed space beneath the highway, the scene shifts dramatically to a homeless encampment. Tents, barrel fires, and makeshift shelters line the dirt ground. The lighting changes from bright neon to warm firelight as the player walks past people sitting and standing among the debris.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a vibrant, neon-lit city intersection into the dim, gritty depths of a hidden homeless encampment. It begins by crossing a busy street beneath towering digital billboards and palm trees before moving onto a sidewalk sheltered by a massive elevated highway. As the camera advances, the environment becomes more enclosed, passing glowing red Kabuki signs and blue Cirrus advertisements while dense traffic flows steadily behind yellow and black barriers. The scene then shifts as the camera turns left away from the bright downtown lights and enters a dark underpass. Finally, the lighting transforms from electric neon to the warm glow of barrel fires, revealing a dirt-ground settlement filled with makeshift tents and debris.
